_note: Original Debug Part 1 additions. These focus on common beginner mistakes and deterministic explanations.

questions.title: Loop goes one step too far
questions.prompt: What is wrong with the loop boundary?
choices: It allows an index equal to the collection length
questions.explanation: Indexes stop one before the length. Using <= permits one extra iteration, so the final access is outside the collection. Use < for an index-based scan.
